title: Eisenstadt, Burgenland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Eisenstadt, Burgenland: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Eisenstadt is a city in Burgenland with a population of 14,476. The capital of Burgenland, home to the magnificent Esterházy Palace, a Haydn museum, and surrounded by the region’s famous wine-growing areas.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
